name: aurora-smart-home
description: Aurora Smart Home - Claude Skills for Home Assistant, ESPHome, Node-RED, and IoT product development

plugins.name: aurora
plugins.description: Aurora Smart Home slash commands - quick access to all four skills

plugins.name: ha-yaml
plugins.description: Home Assistant YAML automation, blueprints, scripts, scenes, template sensors, Sections dashboards, Mushroom cards, presence detection, voice Assist, and Jinja2 templates. Uses modern HA 2024.8+ syntax. 49 reference guides, 17 templates, 300+ prompts.

plugins.name: esphome
plugins.description: ESPHome device configuration and IoT product development. Supports ESP32, ESP32-S3, C3, C6, H2, P4, ESP8266, RP2040, nRF52, LibreTiny. 160+ components, LVGL displays, voice assistant, Matter, Thread, Zigbee. Full product lifecycle: hardware selection with live pricing, KiCad PCB design, 3D enclosures, CE/FCC certification, manufacturing. 28 reference guides, 27 templates, 600+ prompts.

plugins.name: ha-integration
plugins.description: Home Assistant custom integration development in Python. Typed ConfigEntry with runtime_data, DataUpdateCoordinator, config flows, EntityDescription, action responses, repair issues, conversation agents, AI Task entities, HACS v2 publishing. 17 reference guides, 10 templates, 129 prompts.

plugins.name: node-red
plugins.description: Node-RED visual automation flows for Home Assistant using node-red-contrib-home-assistant-websocket v0.80+. trigger-state, api-call-service, function nodes, number/select/text/time-entity nodes, context storage, timer patterns, error handling. Node-RED 4.x compatible. 12 reference guides, 15 templates, 100+ prompts.

plugins.name: api-catalog
plugins.description: Reference guide for connecting popular APIs to Home Assistant via Node-RED, YAML, or custom integrations. Covers auth, endpoints, and working examples for: Tibber, Nordpool, SMHI, OpenWeatherMap, yr.no, Tomorrow.io, SL, Trafikverket, Resrobot, Entur, Shelly, Tuya, Philips Hue, IKEA Dirigera, OpenAI, Spotify, Google Calendar, Telegram, GitHub.

plugins.name: ha-dashboard-design
plugins.description: Beautiful copy-paste Home Assistant dashboard designs. Nine visual styles: Glassmorphism, Dark Minimal, Material You, Nordic, Neon/Cyberpunk, Warm Home, Soft Pastel, Luxury Gold, Retro Terminal. Complete CSS themes, card-mod styles, button-card templates for all card types. Includes image generation prompts for backgrounds and mockups.
